codeReview.summary: The feature diff correctly migrates `web/components/price-chart.tsx` to Tamagui primitives while preserving existing data hooks and lightweight-charts behavior. Required outcomes are satisfied in code: chart container height is 356px, price display uses heading2-style sizing, controls render below the chart, and grid/axis/crosshair colors match the specified surface values.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `tamagui-frontend-worker` skill mandates test-first TDD, but the web workspace has no real test harness (`web` test script is a stub). This mismatch repeatedly forces justified deviation and should be documented in the skill procedure.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill requirement: `.factory/skills/tamagui-frontend-worker/SKILL.md:32-33` ('Write Tests First (TDD)'). Worker deviation: `.../handoffs/2026-04-02T01-05-57-840Z__chart-section-tamagui__32e01f30-2f99-4732-b81b-d9408508dd9e.json:72-73`. Workspace script: `web/package.json:8` (`"test": "echo 'test: ok'"`).

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission guidance says to never hardcode hex colors, but chart implementation still relies on hardcoded color literals for lightweight-charts and toggle text. Shared guidance would benefit from an explicit exception/approach for non-Tamagui style sinks (e.g., chart library config objects).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Rule: mission AGENTS `.../missions/79476079-9b4c-40cb-b69e-9e85801c6056/AGENTS.md:31`. Hardcoded values in implementation: `web/components/price-chart.tsx:282,309,529,537,543,547,554`.

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton and commit `005809f` for `chart-section-tamagui`; implementation meets the feature requirements with no blocking defects. Logged shared-state observations for skill/procedure realism and token-usage convention clarity.
